---
title: 'White Noise'
date: '2013-12-05T05:08:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6036751787443612335'
blogger_filename: '/2013/12/white-noise_4.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'White Noise'
---

<div class="MsoNormal"><br />Bright blinding white permeated the room. A white cardboard box<br />sat on a thin enameled snow white plastic table in a room covered in white<br />painted steel walls. Only the black table legs gave any accent to the hyper<br />real characteristics of this LED lit room. How he got here and why he didnГўв‚¬в„ўt<br />know. Looking down he noticed the white form fitting uniform he was wearing.<br />His deep tan the only other contrast in this other clinically pure room. A soft<br />hiss was coming from the ceiling, but he couldnГўв‚¬в„ўt look up because the ceiling<br />was lit from end to end to end with LEDГўв‚¬в„ўs, turned on high, air conditioner<br />maybe. He could barely see around him without squinting. Disorientation started<br />to settle down after the first few moments awake and he found his bearings.<br />Training kicked in. <o:p></o:p></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br />His thoughts moved to business, take stock. Гўв‚¬Е“Name/Rank:<br />Captain Therun Ashmun, USAF.Гўв‚¬Вќ, he said out loud, more to himself than anyone else. No<br />response. Taking inventory of his body, every part was accounted for, legs,<br />arms, toes, fingers, the scar on his neck under his right ear. No pains, other<br />than the usual. He sat down on his knees monk style and closed his eyes and<br />took deep breaths.<o:p></o:p></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br />Capt Therun Гўв‚¬Е“AshГўв‚¬Вќ Ashmun tried to recall his last memory<br />before finding himself in this room void of any obvious doors, windows, or<br />openings of any kind, not even a seem was apparent as he circled the room with<br />his eyes. The thoughts came like rapid fire. He didnГўв‚¬в„ўt bother feeling about<br />because he was obviously handled before arriving here and obviously must be<br />under surveillance this very moment. No way to defend against attack without<br />knowing where the openings are, but there would be no use because if he were<br />going to be killed he would be in some danky prison cell not this white washed<br />room in some overly tailored biking suit. Still, better to be defensive and keep<br />himself against a wall ready to react. <o:p></o:p></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br />Гўв‚¬Е“Bring it in Ash, bring yourself togetherГўв‚¬В¦ all this white is<br />a bit disorienting. What was the last thing you recall?Гўв‚¬Вќ He had been on Sriklan<br />Island a survival training facility. He had just dropped in from 15,000 feet in<br />air-camo nearly a new suit-shoot being developed, nearly invisible from the<br />ground and air. He landed without a hitch, taking out three guards, high tech<br />motion sensored mannequins, from the air. Working through the forest to the<br />hacienda he had retaken the residence and recovered the Гўв‚¬Е“stolenГўв‚¬Вќ technology and<br />send it back up on a UAV that had landed after he signaled. Routine training<br />mission. Next time theyГўв‚¬в„ўd use people and fake bullets but this time real<br />bullets and fake people provided real time use of the weapon. The fake bullets<br />never quite felt right. One man recovery missions were a great way to have<br />peace. He swam off island to a nearby island and was waiting for his evac. He<br />was perched in a tall tree, hidden by branches on the tallest point of the<br />island. There was a flash of light around him and HeГўв‚¬В¦ thatГўв‚¬в„ўs it, there was no<br />other memory. He woke up here. <o:p></o:p></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br />The box on the table was the only thing in the room with<br />him, besides the table itself, which seems to be built into the floor. He<br />approached the table cautiously. Eyes had adjusted some to the light, but there<br />was still not much to see. The legs and table appeared to be built of high<br />strength alloy. No hopes of breaking it. He pushed at the box, but it too<br />appeared to be a part of the table. It didnГўв‚¬в„ўt budge. Other than being attached<br />it seemed like any other white shipping box, sealed in white duct tape end to<br />end. <o:p></o:p></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br />The table was cool to the touch, not cold, but cool, like<br />everything else in this room, floor, walls, etc. Ash pealed at the tape slowly,<br />ready to react to itГўв‚¬в„ўs contents. This box was obviously here for him, it was<br />the only thing in the room, and no-one had reacted to his being awake. Laying<br />the tape aside he opened the lid and found a pair of ear buds and an iPhone,<br />each neatly wrapped in their own plastic bag. He opened the first bag and<br />turned on the phone.&nbsp;</div><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br />It booted silentlyГўв‚¬В¦ <o:p></o:p><br /><br /><br /></div><br /><div align="center" class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center;"><br /><br /><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br /><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">It's Author Fun</a>&nbsp;By&nbsp;<a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe</a></div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br />To Subscribe to the&nbsp;<a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/AuthorFun" target="_blank">RSS: Click Here</a></div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br />For Non-Fiction writing by&nbsp;<a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">Darrell G. Wolfe: Click Here</a></div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br />Any work not otherwise attributed is Copy Right Darrell G. Wolfe</div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br />All Rights Reserved Г‚В© Darrell G. Wolfe</div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px; text-align: right;"><br /><a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" imageanchor="1"><img alt="Follow me on Facebook" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-63d42e008cf7.png" style="border: 0px; height: 32px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 32px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><img alt="Follow  &lt;b&gt;YOUR-TWITTER-ACCOUNT-NAME&lt;/b&gt; on Twitter" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-77bfad54d6ab.png" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe"><img alt="Follow YOUR-CHANNEL-ID on YouTube" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-320178b5d829.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/AuthorFun" rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml"><img alt="RSS subscription icon" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-6448ae47be33.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a>&nbsp;<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /></div><br /><div id="disqus_thread" style="text-align: start;"><br /><a class="dsq-brlink" href="http://disqus.com/">comments powered by&nbsp;<span class="logo-disqus">Disqus</span></a></div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="text-align: start;"><br />________________________</div><br /></div><br />
